content.content:
1	export const scalePixelArt = (image: string, scale: number): string => {
2	  if (image === "") return "";
3	  return image
4	    .split("\n")
5	    .map((row) =>
6	      row
7	        .split("")
8	        .map((char) => char.repeat(scale))
9	        .join(""),
10	    )
11	    .flatMap((scaledRow) => Array(scale).fill(scaledRow))
12	    .join("\n");
13	};
14
